message:
style(indexer): drop redundant .into_iter() in rayon pre-map zip call

`convs.iter().zip(internal_convs.into_iter())` is just
`convs.iter().zip(internal_convs)` — `Vec<Conversation>` already
`IntoIterator`s in `zip`. Satisfies `clippy::useless_conversion` on
the parallel pre-map site that just landed in 3f947725.

No behaviour change.
